project_section.header_text: Coming from a solid Computer Science foundation, my specialities are graphics programming, game design and development of electronic interfaces. Here is an overview of some of my projects.

about_section.header_text: A programmer, writer and musician from central Stockholm.
about_section.main_text:
Hello! 
 
 The name is Kei. If you have looked around on this site or my LinkedIn, you already know that I am a huge tech enthusiast. I like to tinker with everything from hardware to software, and I take pride in making things that shouldn't be technically feasible possible. I am also a literature nerd and aspiring writer, and engage in the occasional music production. In my spare time, I read, paint, develop games and dance lindy hop. 

 If you have any proposition, business or otherwise, that involves these topics, don't hesitate to reach out over my socials, linked below!
